⚔️ KCraft

← All dungeons

🔥 Blackrock Depths

"Dark Iron dwarf capital deep inside Blackrock Mountain — a sprawling underground city of forges, prison cells, the Grim Guzzler tavern, and the Black Anvil throne."

🎯 BD Loot Summary

Equipment Focus: Pre-raid blue gear stop for almost every spec — Tier-0.5 mat sources, the Black Iron weapons line, Bar event, Ironfoe two-handers, Emperor Thaurissan finale.

  • Best for: Level 52-60
  • Run time: 90-150 minutes (full clear)
  • Mob levels: 48-80
  • Famous for: Ironfoe, Black Iron Tongs (quest), Plugger's Bar event, the Lyceum, Thaurissan's drops, Coren Direbrew (Brewfest)
  • Includes: Detention Block, Lyceum/Throne wing, Vault key, Mole Machine taxi, the Grim Guzzler tavern event
🔧 Filters · all 538 items

Role:
Quality:
Legend:

Trash mobs you encounter clearing the dungeon — set pieces, world drops, and miscellaneous gear from non-boss creatures. They respawn, so multiple kills per run are possible.
